all.en: This report summarizes our second quarter OKR results across all departments.
all.zh: 本報告彙整各部門第二季 OKR 成果。

all.en: The executive team reviewed every objective during the offsite last Friday.
all.zh: 經營團隊已於上週五策略會議中檢視每項目標。

all.en: Overall, we achieved seventy-one percent of planned key results.
all.zh: 整體而言，我們達成既定關鍵成果的 71%。

all.en: This score sits within the healthy target range of sixty to eighty percent.
all.zh: 此分數落在健康目標區間 60% 至 80% 之間。

all.en: Sales exceeded their revenue objective by closing twelve enterprise deals.
all.zh: 銷售部門成交 12 件企業案，超越營收目標。

all.en: Average deal size increased eighteen percent year over year.
all.zh: 平均案件金額年增 18%。

all.en: Marketing reached one million qualified leads, surpassing the goal of nine hundred thousand.
all.zh: 行銷部門取得 100 萬名合格名單，超越 90 萬的目標。

all.en: Conversion from lead to opportunity, however, fell short by four points.
all.zh: 惟名單轉商機的比率未達標四個百分點。

all.en: Engineering shipped both planned platform releases on time and with low defect rates.
all.zh: 工程部門如期推出兩項預定平台版本，且缺陷率偏低。

all.en: Customer reported issues dropped twenty-two percent compared to Q1.
all.zh: 客戶回報問題較 Q1 下降 22%。

all.en: The product team launched two new modules and onboarded ten beta customers.
all.zh: 產品團隊推出兩個新模組，並導入 10 位 Beta 客戶。

all.en: Their adoption rate after thirty days reached seventy-five percent.
all.zh: 上線 30 天後採用率達 75%。

all.en: Customer success retained ninety-six percent of contracts up for renewal.
all.zh: 客戶成功部門使到期合約續約率達 96%。

all.en: Net revenue retention climbed to one hundred and twelve percent.
all.zh: 淨收益保留率升至 112%。

all.en: People operations completed the global engagement survey on schedule.
all.zh: 人力營運部門如期完成全球敬業度調查。

all.en: Employee engagement scores rose three points to seventy-eight.
all.zh: 員工敬業度分數上升 3 分至 78 分。

all.en: Voluntary attrition slowed to nine percent annualized.
all.zh: 自主離職率年化降至 9%。

all.en: Finance closed the books within four business days, a new record.
all.zh: 財務部門於四個工作日內完成結帳，創新紀錄。

all.en: Operating margin expanded by one hundred and sixty basis points.
all.zh: 營業利潤率擴張 160 個基點。

all.en: Several departments missed targets related to internal documentation quality.
all.zh: 數個部門在內部文件品質相關目標上未達標。

all.en: We will prioritize a knowledge management refresh in the next quarter.
all.zh: 下季我們將優先推動知識管理更新。

all.en: All teams should publish Q3 OKR drafts in the planning tool by Friday.
all.zh: 各團隊應於週五前在規劃工具中發布 Q3 OKR 草案。

all.en: Cross-functional alignment sessions take place during the second week of July.
all.zh: 跨部門對齊會議將於 7 月第二週舉行。

all.en: Thank you for your continued focus on outcomes over activities.
all.zh: 感謝大家持續聚焦於成果而非活動。

all.en: The executive team will host an open office hour to discuss the results.
all.zh: 經營團隊將舉辦開放諮詢時段，討論本次成果。

all.en: Drop-in sessions are scheduled for Tuesday and Thursday next week.
all.zh: 下週二與週四將安排隨到隨問場次。

all.en: Please submit questions in advance through the OKR feedback channel.
all.zh: 請事先透過 OKR 回饋頻道提交您的問題。

all.en: Department leads will receive a tailored scorecard by Monday morning.
all.zh: 部門主管將於週一上午收到專屬績效卡。

all.en: Stretch objectives will be flagged separately to avoid skewing average attainment.
all.zh: 延伸目標將另行標示，以避免拉低平均達成率。

all.en: We encourage candid retrospectives that surface lessons rather than blame.
all.zh: 我們鼓勵坦率的回顧，著重學習而非究責。

all.en: A redesigned dashboard will track live progress against Q3 commitments.
all.zh: 全新設計的儀表板將即時追蹤 Q3 承諾的進度。

all.en: Training on the new dashboard runs every Wednesday during July.
all.zh: 新儀表板培訓將於七月每週三舉行。

all.en: Please cascade these insights to your direct reports without delay.
all.zh: 請儘速將上述洞見傳達給您的直屬部屬。

all.en: Together we can turn a strong quarter into a stronger second half.
all.zh: 齊心協力，我們可將強勁的單季表現延續至下半年。

all.en: Quarterly OKR planning workshops will resume the first Monday of July.
all.zh: 季度 OKR 規劃工作坊將於 7 月第一個週一恢復舉行。

all.en: Facilitators have updated the templates based on feedback from last cycle.
all.zh: 引導者已根據上週期回饋更新範本。

all.en: Please bring at least three draft objectives to your team session.
all.zh: 請於團隊會議攜帶至少三項目標草案。

all.en: Cross-functional dependencies must be mapped before final approval is granted.
all.zh: 跨部門依賴關係須於最終核准前完成盤點。

all.en: Confidence ratings on each key result help leaders calibrate ambition early.
all.zh: 各關鍵成果的信心評等有助主管早期校準野心程度。

all.en: Avoid binary milestones in favor of measurable graduated targets where possible.
all.zh: 盡量避免二元里程碑，改採可量化的階段性目標。

all.en: Mid-quarter check-ins remain the primary moment for honest course correction.
all.zh: 季中檢視仍是坦誠調整方向的主要時機。

all.en: Document blockers proactively so leadership can unblock them quickly.
all.zh: 主動記錄阻礙，俾使領導階層能迅速排除。

all.en: We will celebrate notable wins at the all-hands meeting next month.
all.zh: 下月將於全體員工大會中表揚顯著成果。

all.en: Thank you for the discipline and creativity you bring to every objective.
all.zh: 感謝您於每項目標中所展現的紀律與創意。

all.en: Honestly, setting personal OKRs at home with my partner saved our weekends from total chaos.
all.zh: 老實說，在家裡跟我另一半一起訂個人 OKR，救了我們的週末避免一團亂。

all.en: We picked three goals each quarter, like more cooking nights and one weekend hike.
all.zh: 我們每季各挑三個目標，像是多在家煮幾頓飯、週末出去爬一次山之類的。

all.en: By the end of the quarter we both felt a little lighter and definitely better fed.
all.zh: 到了季末，我們兩個都覺得心情輕鬆許多，肚子也養得圓潤多了。

all.en: Try sharing one personal OKR with your team to make the framework feel less corporate.
all.zh: 試著跟團隊分享一項你的個人 OKR，這樣這套架構就不會那麼公事公辦。

all.en: My direct reports laughed when I confessed mine was learning to bake decent sourdough bread.
all.zh: 我直屬部屬聽到我招認我的目標是學會烤出像樣的酸種麵包都笑了。

all.en: Three months later, two of them brought sourdough loaves to our team retrospective.
all.zh: 三個月後，有兩位同事居然帶了酸種麵包來我們的團隊回顧會議。

all.en: Honestly, those small moments build trust faster than any teambuilding workshop I have run.
all.zh: 老實說，這種小小的時刻比我辦過的任何團建工作坊都更能建立信任。

all.en: Please be kind to yourself when a key result does not land where you hoped it would.
all.zh: 如果關鍵成果沒有達到你期待的位置，請對自己溫柔一點。

all.en: I missed my biggest stretch target last quarter and learned more from that miss than from any win.
all.zh: 上一季我最大的延伸目標沒達成，但我從那次失敗學到的，比任何成功都還多。

all.en: Bring that growth mindset into your Q3 drafts and we will be unstoppable together.
all.zh: 把這種成長心態帶進你的 Q3 草案，我們一起就沒什麼擋得住了。
